parameters.note: Instagram Graph API placeholder - to be implemented later. Use /instagram/image endpoint to push to Instagram.
parameters.text:
Instagram API Placeholder

To persist to Nginx volume, mount n8n container with: -v /var/www/html/maya-assets:/tmp/maya-assets
Or adjust the filepath to a mounted volume

Future implementation:
- Add HTTP Request node to call Instagram Graph API
- Use Instagram API endpoint: /instagram/image
- Authenticate using Instagram Access Token
- Upload image with caption and metadata

Place this node as Node 4 if Instagram posting is needed.
